originalTitle: A way to exclude sensitive files issue still open for OpenAI Codex
content:
There was an error while loading. Please reload this page .

What feature would you like to see?

Are you interested in implementing this feature?

Related: #205 . That issue surfaced two primary use cases: preventing sensitive data from being sent to the model and excluding large/irrelevant files. The issue was closed in favor of a Rust (codex-rs) implementation, but as of 2025-08-28 a comparable feature does not appear to exist in codex-rs. I’d like to restart the discussion and converge on a design.
chineseTitle: OpenAI Codex 仍存在排除敏感文件问题的方法
chineseContent:
加载时出错。请重新加载此页面。

您想看到什么功能？

您有兴趣实施此功能吗？

相关：#205。该问题出现了两个主要用例：防止敏感数据发送到模型以及排除大型/不相关的文件。该问题已结束，有利于 Rust (codex-rs) 实现，但截至 2025 年 8 月 28 日，codex-rs 中似乎不存在类似的功能。我想重新开始讨论并集中在设计上。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
